content: لاَزِم نِشتَغَل سَوا عَلَشان الشُغل يِخلَص في وَقت أقَلّ
translations: eng:we must work together to finish the work sooner

transcriptions.arabizi: laezim nishtaghal sawa Aalashaen ilshughl yichlas fi wa't 'a'all
